headlines.headline: Strynal Industries names new head of process automation division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head can signal strategic shifts or operational improvements, but the immediate financial impact is indirect and uncertain.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
